home.subline_text: any video, audio, or photo — from 20+
home.advanced_help_suffix: . for codec / container / resize / output kind / loudnorm, see
home.trim_invalid: invalid time format. use ss, mm:ss, or hh:mm:ss
home.unexpected_error: something unexpected happened. check the console and try again.
home.lp_summary_one: {n} stream to merge ({type}). nothing leaves your device.
home.lp_summary_many: {n} streams to merge ({type}). nothing leaves your device.

api.generic: something went wrong on our end. try again in a moment.
api.invalid_body: couldn't parse that request. is the URL well-formed?
api.rate_exceeded: you're going too fast. wait a bit and try again.

header.accept: the api needs an Accept: application/json header.
header.content_type: the api needs a Content-Type: application/json header.

auth.not_configured: this instance isn't accepting anonymous requests.

jwt.missing: this instance needs a session token. refresh and try again.
jwt.invalid: session token rejected. refresh and try again.

turnstile.missing: captcha challenge missing. refresh and try again.
turnstile.invalid: captcha challenge failed. refresh and try again.

link.invalid: that doesn't look like a valid URL.
link.unsupported: this site isn't supported. check the list at the bottom of the page.

service.unsupported: this service isn't supported on this instance.
service.audio_not_supported: audio extraction isn't supported for this service.

token.required: this service needs an API key configured on the instance.

fetch.empty: the source returned nothing. the post may be deleted or private.
fetch.critical: the upstream fetch failed. try again, or try a different format.
fetch.rate: the upstream is rate-limiting us. try again in a few minutes.

trim.invalid_range: trim range is invalid (start ≥ end, or past the file length).

batch.invalid_url: one of the URLs in the batch is invalid.
batch.unknown_options: unknown option in batch request body.

content.too_long: this content is too long for this instance.

video.live: live streams aren't supported. wait for the VOD.

youtube.api_error: youtube returned an error. try again in a moment.
youtube.decipher: youtube changed something. an instance update may be needed.
youtube.drm: this video is DRM-protected. snag won't bypass DRM.
youtube.login: youtube wants a login for this video. anonymous fetch failed.
youtube.no_hls_streams: no HLS streams available for this video.
youtube.no_matching_format: no stream matches the requested quality + codec.
youtube.no_session_tokens: the instance has no youtube session tokens configured.
youtube.token_expired: the instance's youtube session token expired.
